system.description: Building a relationship is hard, so take one that's already built. Think of someone in a target's life (Grace’s mother, Diego’s husband) even if you don't know them well. Say something they might say to the target and roll [quality].

outcomes.success:
you have always been
that person, and all memories the target
had with that person now feature you,
instead. This effect lasts until the end of
the current Mission or until you choose
to end it, whichever comes first. If the
target interacts with the person you’ve
Replaced during this time, they will
treat them as a complete stranger.
outcomes.failure:
this replacement is permanent,
and you lose someone in exchange. You
must immediately replace one of your
Relationships with the target. The person
you replaced now remembers your old
Relationship in place of the target.
outcomes.every3rd3:
choose one:
  • You can also access the target’s memories of you for the duration of the replacement.
  • At the end of the effect, the target will remember all interactions with you as if you had been the person you replaced.
  • You can adopt one feature of the person you’re Replacing, as in Borrow.

improvement.question: When my friends go on vacation, I'll...

answer2.text: Create the perfect schedule for their trip.
